prompt: I need to run GEMM on the NPU for a matrix multiply where my A is 512x1024 and B is 1024x768. Use int8.
assertions: The agent correctly identifies M=512, N=768, K=1024 from the matrix dimensions described
The strategy correctly identifies that no padding is needed (all dims already in ALLOWED lists)
The strategy block includes dtype: i8 or int8
The strategy source is one of: hashmap_27, sorted_first_fit, preprocessed_map, fallback
Phase 0 reads from the knowledge base and profiling data
The agent completes all 5 phases or explains clearly why a phase was skipped
